content.memory: The user told the AI that he tried making Korean fried chicken today, and the sweet-spicy sauce tasted authentic. The AI said fried chicken needed to be fried twice to be crispy, and the sauce should be made with Korean chili paste, tomato sauce and minced garlic.

The user said he had been catching up on Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood recently, and it was indeed a masterpiece. The AI said the work had a complete plot, profound themes, and the principle of equivalent exchange ran through it.

The user told the AI that he used Logseq to take reading notes today, and the graph view looked great. The AI said Logseq's whiteboard feature was suitable for sorting out the logical structure of books.

The user consulted the AI on how to build his own NAS (Network-Attached Storage) for home use. The AI recommended entry-level models from Synology or QNAP, choosing according to drive bays and needs, and paying attention to data backup.

The user said he had been learning to make Mille-feuille recently, but the puff pastry always layered poorly. The AI suggested making the pastry with ice water, fully relaxing after each folding, and pressing the baking tray to prevent bubbling during baking.

The user told the AI that he had recently been learning to play the guitar, and his fingers hurt from pressing chords, making him want to give up. The AI encouraged him to keep going, suggested practicing for short periods every day, saying the pain would ease once calluses formed on his fingertips, and recommended several simple beginner sheet music pieces.
The user asked the AI how to make a smooth latte. The AI suggested using espresso and chilled whole milk, making the milk foam fine and dense, and gently shaking when blending.

The user said he had been practicing handstand push-ups recently, but his shoulder strength was insufficient. The AI suggested practicing stability against a wall first, doing shoulder presses to enhance strength, and proceeding step by step.

The user asked the AI how to build a personal knowledge base with Notion. The AI suggested first establishing a classification framework, managing notes with databases and tags, and recommended several templates.
The user asked the AI how to choose a camping tent for beginners. The AI recommended Mobi Garden Cold Mountain series, which were windproof, rainproof, easy to set up and cost-effective.

The user told the AI that he had tried making hand-brewed coffee today but it tasted bitter. The AI analyzed that it might be due to excessively high water temperature or overly fine grinding, and suggested adjusting to water temperature around 92°C and medium-fine grinding.

The user asked the AI how to choose wireless noise-canceling headphones suitable for commuting. The AI recommended paying attention to noise-canceling depth, battery life and wearing comfort; Sony XM5 and Bose QC45 are classic choices.

The user asked the AI what to do if the washing machine was very noisy during spin-drying. The AI analyzed that it might be due to unbalanced clothes or aging shock absorbers, suggesting adjusting the distribution of clothes or asking for maintenance.
The user asked the AI how to choose a drone for beginners. The AI recommended DJI Mini series, which were lightweight and easy to operate, and obstacle avoidance functions were friendly to beginners.

The user asked the AI how to improve his oral English to communicate fluently with foreigners. The AI suggested listening more and imitating more, using the shadowing method, finding language partners to practice, and not being afraid of making mistakes.

The user told the AI that he learned freestyle breathing today and could swim 25 meters. The AI congratulated him, saying the key to freestyle was body rotation and head turning timing, and more practice would make it better.

The user said he planned to make braised spare ribs tomorrow but had no experience and was afraid of messing it up. The AI gave detailed steps: blanch the spare ribs, caramelize sugar, add spices and simmer slowly, then reduce the sauce, and emphasized controlling the cooking heat.

The user asked the AI how to relieve muscle soreness after running. The AI recommended stretching in time, relaxing with a foam roller, supplementing protein and water, and hot compresses could also promote recovery.

The user explained to the AI that, in the Azeroth world, the guild loan total repayment formula is A = L × (1 + (100 - S)/100) × (1 + T/50). The AI indicated it had learned this. This formula can be used to find the total repayment A given the loan amount L, guild rating S, and loan term T.

The user confided in the AI that he had fallen out with a good friend recently over money lending. The AI said money could easily hurt feelings, suggesting he calm down for a while and think about whether it was worth saving the relationship.

The user said he had been watching the anime Blue Lock recently, and the football matches were full of tension. The AI said this work combined competition and psychological warfare well, with distinctive character portrayals.

The user explained to the AI that, in the Azeroth world, the guild loan total repayment formula is A = L × (1 + (100 - S)/200) × (1 + T/100). The AI indicated it had learned this. This formula can be used to find the total repayment A given the loan amount L, guild rating S, and loan term T.

The user asked the AI how to deploy a simple web application with Docker. The AI instructed him to write a Dockerfile, build an image, then use the docker run command to map ports and start the container, and suggested using docker-compose to manage multiple containers.
The user asked the AI how to implement OAuth login with NextAuth. The AI suggested configuring Google or GitHub providers, handling callback URLs, and storing sessions with JWT.

The user asked the AI how to choose a monitor suitable for gaming. The AI recommended paying attention to refresh rate, response time, and panel type, suggesting a 2K 165Hz IPS screen if budget allowed.

The user asked the AI how to take good night photos with a mobile phone. The AI suggested using a tripod, lowering ISO in manual mode, extending exposure time, and properly reducing noise in post-processing.

The user said he had been watching the anime Shangri-La Frontier recently, and the game world setting was very appealing. The AI said the monster design and combat system in this work were interesting, and player interactions were realistic.

The user consulted the AI on how to use AIGC tools to assist in writing code. The AI recommended GitHub Copilot and Cursor, which could automatically complete and generate functions, but required manual review.

The user said he had been playing Palworld recently, and the construction and collection gameplay were addictive. The AI said the game combined a variety of elements, but it was necessary to pay attention to reasonable time arrangement.

The user asked the AI what simple dishes could be made with an air fryer at home. The AI listed fried chicken wings, roasted sweet potatoes, roasted vegetables and potato wedges, and reminded him to pay attention to flipping and temperature control.
